case_title: GRELLE, BENJAMIN et al VS BUEHLER, KAREN

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BUEHLER, KAREN
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $625.00 FILED BY GRELLE, BENJAMIN KING, ALLISON AS TO DEFENDANT BUEHLER, KAREN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-21-1992 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 00

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GRELLE, BENJAMIN KING, ALLISON IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BUEHLER, KAREN NOT ENTITLED TO LOSS OF WAGES ($548.95 PREVIOUSLY PAID BY DEFENDANT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOT. OF JUDGMENT TO KAREN BUEHLEN RETURNED, MOVED.
TRIAL RESET TO JAN-05-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02 TRIAL OF DEC-21-1992 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
